response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Handled alignment with the lyrics. Corrected transcription discrepancies for live/on-screen vocal nuances.
2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference was referenced for the live song segment, while manual transcription was performed to capture the post-live MC/talk segment (03:17-05:00).
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles were synchronized precisely with the vocal track. Addressed formatting bugs and duplication issues to ensure clean, valid output.

subtitles.original: おはよー！ 新しい今日にご挨拶
subtitles.english: Good morning! Greeting a new day today too!

subtitles.original: ってあれ？ 嘘！ もうこんな時間？
subtitles.english: Wait, what? No way! It's already this time?!

subtitles.original: おでかけ予定あるのに
subtitles.english: Even though I have plans to go out,

subtitles.original: すぐに支度をしなきゃ
subtitles.english: I must get ready quickly!

subtitles.original: 行ってきます！
subtitles.english: I'm off!

subtitles.original: 慌てて飛び出して気づく
subtitles.english: I rushed out only to realize...

subtitles.original: こっちじゃない！ こっちだっけ？
subtitles.english: Not this way! Is it this way?

subtitles.original: 助けてーー！ 空も！
subtitles.english: Help me, Sora too!

subtitles.original: トラブルばっか 転んで起きての毎日です
subtitles.english: Nothing but trouble, falling down and getting up every day.

subtitles.original: なんでも思い通りとか そんな美味しい話はないけれど
subtitles.english: There's no sweet deal where everything goes your way, but...

subtitles.original: 心の曇り トラブル放す合言葉 唱えて
subtitles.english: Reciting the password to clear my mind's clouds and cast away trouble,

subtitles.original: おはように ほら 快晴でしょう ずっと
subtitles.english: Saying "Good morning," look, it's completely clear, forever!

subtitles.original: みんなに届けたい 歌もダンスも元気も
subtitles.english: I want to deliver to everyone my singing, dancing, and energy too!

subtitles.original: いつも同じ空の下 笑顔も分け合えるよ
subtitles.english: Under the same sky as always, we can share our smiles.

subtitles.original: ちょっと疲れちゃう時も 涙が出そうな時も
subtitles.english: Even when I get a little tired, or when I feel like crying,

subtitles.original: いつも魔法の言葉で 今日も てらせ らせらの空！
subtitles.english: With the magic words as always, today too, light up Rasera's sky!

subtitles.original: せーの！ てらせらせら！
subtitles.english: Ready, set... terase rasera!

subtitles.original: みんな声出してーー！
subtitles.english: Everyone, let me hear your voices!

subtitles.original: 今日も一日がんばろう
subtitles.english: Let's do our best today too!

subtitles.original: カメラにマイクに よし準備OK！
subtitles.english: Camera, microphone, alright, preparation OK!

subtitles.original: お水もちゃんとあるし
subtitles.english: I have my water ready too,

subtitles.original: そなえさえあれば嬉しいです
subtitles.english: as long as I'm prepared, I'm happy!

subtitles.original: それじゃ今日は何をしようかな？ お歌に雑談に あ、トラブル！
subtitles.english: Well then, what shall I do today? Singing, chatting, ah, trouble!

subtitles.original: みんなと笑い合わせば また明日も晴れ晴れだ よっしゃ！
subtitles.english: If we laugh together, tomorrow will be sunny again! Alright!

subtitles.original: みんな声出してーー！
subtitles.english: Everyone, let me hear your voices!

subtitles.original: ふうとため息こぼして ふと夜空を見上げたら
subtitles.english: With a soft sigh, when I suddenly look up at the night sky,

subtitles.original: ぽっと満天の星たちが キラキラ瞬いていた
subtitles.english: Suddenly, the starry sky twinkles brightly.

subtitles.original: ずっと追いかけ続けたい 雲より高い夢でも
subtitles.english: I want to keep chasing it forever, even if it's a dream higher than the clouds.

subtitles.original: もっと強く羽ばたいて 空まで駆け抜けていくよ
subtitles.english: Flapping my wings even stronger, I will run all the way to the sky!

subtitles.original: そっと背中を押すような ぬくもりに包まれたから
subtitles.english: Because I was wrapped in a warmth that gently pushes my back,

subtitles.original: いつまでもそばにいたい 今日も明日も ずっと
subtitles.english: I want to be by your side forever, today, tomorrow, and always.

subtitles.original: てらせ らせらの空！ せーの！
subtitles.english: Light up Rasera's sky! Ready, set...

subtitles.original: てらせらせら！
subtitles.english: ...terase rasera!

subtitles.original: みんなーー！
subtitles.english: Everyone!

subtitles.original: みんなーー！
subtitles.english: Everyone!

subtitles.original: 新年、明けまして...
subtitles.english: Happy...

subtitles.original: ...おめでとうございますーー！
subtitles.english: ...New Year!

subtitles.original: 本日は、お寒いなか、ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for coming in this cold weather today!

subtitles.original: みんな来れた？
subtitles.english: Could everyone make it?

subtitles.original: あ、来れてるからいるの分かってる、あの、ちゃんと、安全に来れましたか？
subtitles.english: Ah, I know you made it since you're here. Um, did you all arrive safely?

subtitles.original: え、今回のソロライブは、えっと、私のライブ史上最大規模ということで、凄く大きな会場で
subtitles.english: So, this solo live is, um, the largest scale in my live show history, in an incredibly big venue.

subtitles.original: あの、ハッシュタグとかも見てたんだけど、「でかっ！」って。「でかいの凄いな」って書いてる人がいっぱいいて
subtitles.english: And, I was looking at the hashtags and saw things like, "It's huge!" and "The size is amazing!"

subtitles.original: 私も「でかいな、凄いな」って思いながら見てました。
subtitles.english: I was also looking at it thinking, "It really is huge, how amazing!"

subtitles.original: リハーサルの時は、「ここ、ここにいっぱいそらともさん来るね」って言われて
subtitles.english: During rehearsals, they told me, "A lot of Soratomo-san are going to fill this place up!"

subtitles.original: 「え、誰もいないじゃん！誰もいないよ！誰もいない...」
subtitles.english: "But wait, there's no one here! Nobody's here! Nobody..."

subtitles.original: っていう会話をしながら、え、とても楽しくやっておりました。
subtitles.english: While having that conversation, we had a lot of fun.

subtitles.original: でもみんないるね、ありがとう！
subtitles.english: But everyone is actually here! Thank you!

subtitles.original: というわけで、今日！初めて！ライブだよって人ー！
subtitles.english: So, is there anyone here for whom today is their very first live concert?

subtitles.original: おー、結構いるねー
subtitles.english: Oh, quite a few!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、現地自体初めてだよって人！
subtitles.english: Then, how about people for whom it's their first time being at the actual venue?

subtitles.original: 結構いる、ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Quite a few! Thank you!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、がんばって、あ、手振るだけでいいからね、あの
subtitles.english: Now then, do your best—ah, just waving is fine, okay? Um...

subtitles.original: 女の子ーー！
subtitles.english: Girls!

subtitles.original: おー！声出してくれてありがとう！「キャー！」聞こえた！
subtitles.english: Oh! Thank you for raising your voices! I heard a "Kyah!"

subtitles.original: 男の子ーー！
subtitles.english: Boys!

subtitles.original: おー！ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Oh! Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: え、これってあれ、ペンライトとかできんのかな？あ、できないのかな？え、でき、できるかな？
subtitles.english: Um, can we do the penlight thing? Ah, can we not? Can we do it?

subtitles.original: こちらのひと、赤ー！
subtitles.english: People on this side, red!

subtitles.original: こちらの人は、青ー！
subtitles.english: People on this side, blue!

subtitles.original: 真ん中のは、黄色ー！
subtitles.english: And the middle, yellow!
